allow: PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/" -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object StatusCode } catch { "无法连接: $_" })
PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/" -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { "无法连接" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/" -TimeoutSec 2 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { "端口 5000 仍有服务响应 \(Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } else { "端口 5000 无响应" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess, @{N='ProcessName';E={\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName}})

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/" -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { "服务已启动，Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { "启动失败" })

PowerShell(foreach \($p in @\(20188, 15940, 13968\)\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Host "PID $p : $\($proc.ProcessName\) 启动时间=$\($proc.StartTime\)" } else { Write-Host "PID $p : 进程不存在（僵尸条目）" } })
PowerShell(python "D:\\.claude\\skills\\ui-ux-pro-max\\scripts\\search.py" "utility tool document processing professional clean functional" --design-system -p "PDF Report Tool")
